steps.title: Trace the two research approaches
steps.content: The text first describes ancient DNA, an approach long used by researchers. It then pivots to Morel and colleagues' use of historical DNA from museum specimens and ends by stressing the research potential of that underused source.

steps.title: Avoid overstated structure claims
steps.content: Choice A says the text explains why historical DNA is underused, but it does not. Choice C invents a challenge to earlier findings. Choice D claims the alternative technique is superior, which the text never asserts. The answer is B.
